site.title: Rohit Dalal · Senior Software Engineer | Backend, platforms & reliability
site.description: Senior engineer (10+ years) shipping APIs, distributed systems, and cloud platforms for **distributed, global teams**. Based in India; **open to Remote, Hybrid, and OnSite** roles with flexible timezone overlap. Go, Kubernetes, Node/TypeScript. Open to senior IC and platform roles.
site.keywords: Rohit Dalal, software engineer, backend, platform engineering, Remote, Hybrid, OnSite, distributed systems, SRE, Golang, Kubernetes, DevOps, reliability, full-stack
site.ogDescription: Backends, platforms, and reliable systems at scale. Go, Kubernetes, APIs. Open to senior IC roles — Remote, Hybrid, or OnSite.
site.ogImageAlt: Rohit Dalal — software engineer, platforms and reliability
site.twitterDescription: Backends, Kubernetes, APIs, and production operations. Open to Remote, Hybrid, and OnSite opportunities.

hero.title: I design and ship software that stays calm when traffic doesn’t.
lead: I’m strongest where **product delivery** meets **platform reality**—APIs and services, **Kubernetes** and CI/CD, observability, and pragmatic tradeoffs under load. Comfortable with **async collaboration** and **distributed teams** across time zones.
I mentor, review, and own incidents when it counts. If you need a **senior IC** who can bridge product and infrastructure—**Remote, Hybrid, OnSite, or fully distributed**—we should talk.

meta.value: Senior IC & platform roles (all work modes)

paragraphs: I care about systems that behave predictably in production: bounded contexts, observable deployments, and decisions you can explain to finance as well as engineering. Lately that’s meant **SSR/ISR** for high-traffic surfaces, **SEO** and release pipelines, and internal tooling operators actually want to use. I’m used to **async collaboration** with stakeholders in **multiple regions**.

I’m direct in code review, patient in mentorship, and intentional about **AI-assisted workflows** where they improve throughput—not where they replace ownership. If your roadmap needs someone who can own **reliability, cost, and delivery** at scale, we’ll get along.

bullets: Led migration of key surfaces to **SSR/ISR**—**~30% faster deploys** and stronger performance for very high-traffic pages while maintaining **SLO 99.99%**.
Delivered **Hacktoberfest** admin and stakeholder tooling—operational visibility at **program scale** (users, PRs, reporting).
Advanced **SEO** and sitemap coverage; improved crawlability and visibility for marketing surfaces.
Championed **responsible AI-assisted development** (e.g. Copilot, Cursor) so the team gains speed without losing review discipline.
Built **backup/restore automation** on **Azure** and **Kubernetes**—roughly **80% lower** monthly disk spend with faster recovery posture.
**gRPC** and **REST** microservices in **Go** and Node; tightened K8s layout and release practices for smoother delivery.
Mentored juniors, drove reviews, and owned **production incidents** end-to-end.
**AWS** and CI/CD with a **~99.7% uptime** target; integrated third-party services with dependable near-real-time sync.
Greenfield **PostGrid**-class product: backend, frontend, and DevOps from zero to production.
Optimized **unit economics** for high-volume postcard and letter generation; **AWS Lambda** and serverless API patterns.
Admin dashboards and APIs on the **MERN** stack.
**AWS** operations with emphasis on security and scale.
Replaced chat polling with **WebSockets**; introduced ORM patterns across **Node** codebases.
**REST** APIs across Node, Laravel, MySQL, MongoDB for multiple clients; **deployments**, DB admin, and security hardening.

projects.title: Selected work
projects.lede: Outcome-focused snapshots—happy to go deeper on architecture and tradeoffs.

items.name: DigitalOcean marketing site
items.desc: **SSR/ISR** migration, CI/CD, and infra hardening for **very high traffic**—deployment time down ~**30%**, **SLO 99.98%** maintained.

items.name: Hacktoberfest operations
items.desc: Internal product and admin UX for a global program—stakeholder reporting, PR volume, and participant operations at scale.

items.name: PostGrid (EdKent)
items.desc: Millions of postcards and letters with tight **unit costs**—MERN, GitHub Actions, **AWS**, serverless patterns.

items.name: Safecity
items.desc: Red Dot Foundation—civic reporting with police and government; throughput for incidents and events.

items.name: Datalab (Unilever)
items.desc: ~**80%** disk cost reduction via backup and recovery design—React, Node, TypeScript, **Kubernetes**, **Azure**.

contact.title: Let’s talk
contact.text: Hiring for platform, backend, or full-stack—with space to own reliability, cost, and delivery? **Remote, Hybrid, OnSite, and distributed** setups welcome. Send a note with the role, working hours or overlap expectations, and what success looks like in the first 90 days.
